run_purpose: Observe UI token correlation between OCR and logs; synthetic OCR rows may be injected for determinism without Tesseract.

cases.expected_behavior: score in both synthetic OCR and log with nearby timestamps → correlation_strength strong, token_overlap reasoning.
inventory only in OCR → weak, single source runtime_log absent.
health/hp only in log lines → weak from log side only.
pause/menu surface in OCR only → weak; generic_ui_token_only noise likely.
score in OCR and log but timestamps far apart → medium strength; token_without_temporal_support.
